case_title: DAVID CHESSEY VS. TECH SOLUTIONS GROUP, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHESSEY, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT TECH SOLUTIONS GROUP, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHESSEY, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TECH SOLUTIONS GROUP, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $32,728.50 PRINCIPAL, $55.35 INTEREST, $410.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $33,193.85, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
